emotional_tone: Intelligent, futuristic, precise, authoritative AI brain.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: The 'Control Room' Grid - Dense, data-heavy, edge-to-edge alignment.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Retro-Futurism (The Terminal Look). Deep black backgrounds with high-contrast neon accents. Cards have sharp edges and subtle inner borders.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-[#030305] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#33EEFF] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all rounded-sm px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: border border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/10 transition-all rounded-sm px-6 py-3

components.cards: bg-[#0D0D12] border border-white/10 rounded-sm overflow-hidden hover:border-[#00E5FF]/40 transition-colors duration-300 relative
components.inputs: bg-[#030305] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-sm focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] placeholder-white/30 font-mono

charts.radar: Use Recharts. Stroke color: #00E5FF, fill color: #00E5FF with 20% opacity. Axis lines in white/20. Text in JetBrains Mono.
charts.bar: Use Recharts. Bars in #00E5FF for positive feature importance, #FF0055 for negative/low. No rounded corners on bars.

components.tracing_beam_card: For the main prediction result card, use a glowing cyan border that mimics a tracing beam (achievable via a CSS animated gradient border mask).

animations.entrance: Staggered fade-in and slide-up for dashboard grid items using framer-motion.
animations.data_reveal: Number counters ticking up for confidence scores.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark neon network nodes. Use this as an ultra-low opacity background overlay (bg-black/90 or similar) behind the login page or as a subtle texture in the dashboard header.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text on deep black surfaces. Neon cyan/pink used only for accents/borders or text against very dark backgrounds. Meet APCA standards.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='predict-submit-button', data-testid='skill-input-math').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts: Unbounded (Headings) and JetBrains Mono (Body/Data).
Install required icons: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react (for a technical, sharp look).
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the main structural grid, prioritizing 'The Control Room' dense dashboard layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4).
Utilize Shadcn components for forms, select, slider (for skill inputs), and customize them by stripping heavy radii (`rounded-md` -> `rounded-sm`) and applying the neon theme.
For the radar chart and bar chart, use Recharts and theme them with #00E5FF and dark backgrounds. Turn off default tooltips or style them strictly to match the dark theme.
Do not use generic 'blue' or 'indigo'. Stick strictly to Cyan (#00E5FF) and Hot Pink (#FF0055).
Ensure the prediction result is the visual centerpiece. Give it an energetic, glowing treatment.
Login/Signup page should feel like accessing a secure, high-tech terminal.
